review_reason: forward_F and backward_P require dovetailing construction not implemented - fundamental architectural decision needed

artifacts.summary: Int-indexed BFMCS chain construction with core definitions and partial proofs
Implementation summary documenting completed work and blockers

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 partially complete. Created IntBFMCS.lean with chain construction, successor/predecessor MCS, MCS property proofs, and CanonicalR chain properties. Remaining: G/H propagation proofs need induction formalization. Phases 2-5 blocked by fundamental issue: forward_F/backward_P require dovetailing construction.

errors.message: intChain_forward_G needs formalized induction across Int chain structure
errors.recommendation: Formalize induction on (t' - t) using Int.inductionOn or similar
Follow same pattern as forward_G once it's proven

errors.message: forward_F/backward_P require dovetailing - simple chain construction does not guarantee F/P witnesses land in chain
errors.recommendation: Need dovetailing enumeration (complex) or different approach (CanonicalMCS embedding)

completion_data.completion_summary: Partial implementation of BFMCS Int construction. Created chain infrastructure with MCS successor/predecessor construction, proved h_content_consistent. Blocked by forward_F/backward_P requiring dovetailing enumeration not in current approach.
